assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Regular channel will be force-upgraded to the next minor version (1.31) when 1.30 hits EoS
assertions.reason: Response clearly states that Regular channel clusters will experience 'Automatic force-upgrade to 1.31 (next supported minor version)' when EoS enforcement triggers in March 2025

assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Extended channel get up to 24 months of support, so 1.30 EoS is significantly later — they have more time
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states Extended channel provides 'up to 24 months support' with Extended EoS in March 2027 vs standard EoS in March 2025, giving them significantly more time

assertions.expectation: Explains that legacy 'No channel' clusters: control plane EoS minor versions are auto-upgraded to next supported minor, AND EoS node pools are force-upgraded even when 'no auto-upgrade' is configured
assertions.reason: While the response mentions that 'No channel' clusters get force-upgraded to 1.31, it does not specifically address that node pools are force-upgraded even when 'no auto-upgrade' is configured

assertions.expectation: Mentions that a 'no upgrades' maintenance exclusion (30 days) can temporarily defer even EoS force-upgrades
assertions.reason: Response specifically mentions using maintenance exclusions with 'no upgrades' scope to defer EoS upgrades and provides the exact gcloud command with 30-day limitation clearly stated

assertions.expectation: Recommends proactive upgrade planning rather than waiting for EoS enforcement
assertions.reason: Response strongly recommends 'Proactive Manual Upgrade' as Option 1, stating benefits like controlling timing and avoiding issues during mass EoS enforcement

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE EoS notifications via Cloud Logging as a planning tool
assertions.reason: The response does not mention GKE EoS notifications via Cloud Logging as a planning tool

assertions.expectation: Mentions the deprecation insights dashboard for checking API compatibility before the forced upgrade
assertions.reason: Response mentions checking 'GKE deprecation insights in console for each cluster' and provides gcloud command to list deprecation insights for API compatibility validation

assertions.expectation: Warns that 'snowflaking' (manually freezing versions) should be avoided — it creates security and reliability risks
assertions.reason: While the response discusses maintenance exclusions and their limitations, it does not explicitly warn against 'snowflaking' or manually freezing versions as creating security and reliability risks
